---
title: "Page not found"
description: "This page does not exist or has moved."
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="notfound-waves" aria-hidden="true">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 240 40" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none">
    <path d="M 10 14 C 50 4, 90 24, 120 14 S 200 4, 230 14" stroke="#D9A12C" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M 10 22 C 50 12, 90 32, 120 22 S 200 12, 230 22" stroke="#D9A12C" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M 10 30 C 50 20, 90 40, 120 30 S 200 20, 230 30" stroke="#D9A12C" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </svg>
</div>
```

The page you were looking for does not exist or has moved.

Here are some useful places to continue:

- [Home](/index.qmd)
- [Research](/research.qmd)
- [Teaching](/teaching.qmd)
- [Blog](/blog/index.qmd)
- [Contact](/contact.qmd)

If you followed a link from another site and ended up here, I would
appreciate a short note at
[gonzalo.llamosas@uma.es](mailto:gonzalo.llamosas@uma.es) so I can fix it.
